final:
module counter_4bit (
  input clk,
  input reset,
  input enable,
  output reg [3:0] count
);

  always @(posedge clk) begin
    if (reset) begin
      count <= 4'b0;
    end else if (enable) begin
      count <= count + 1;
    end
  end

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
    end
  end

endmodule
